textByHash.3e5fa88ec4621182521b41944abb45ffdf9997b5: Ah, there you are. Oh, I'm sorry, am I meant to bow?
textByHash.cbb1034bb04b66c3b8596d6b088a90132e9efdef: Yes, of course, Your... Holiness? Your Excellency? I'm sorry, I've never had the luck of meeting a god before. What is your preferred title?
textByHash.40355da20c01c488cd9ec5966f5e71ccc153d38a: Why? You are powerless to do anything about it. Without me, you go back to your Augur empty handed. I get the feeling she wouldn't like that.
textByHash.b5da58b7c0f6ad0b28182fe5e0cb459089a9dfda: No? If that's the case, then why are you doing her bidding? Of all the people she could have sent here, why did she pick her gods reborn?
textByHash.3626cd40856c6ab6a4fcff1cc82ea81d27411e36: Ha! And what will you see? What happens when you reach the apparent centre of the world, only to discover that everything you thought you knew, was wrong?
textByHash.de6f85c2a34d5a83bdf3d9cafd199cba056f5749: Yes, I believe so. However, it will not be straightforward.
textByHash.9bd2d31a27d0e41f33ea57b621f2e2cb1b782469: I will need you to retrieve something for me. The crypt doors are sealed using the magic of an Old One keystone. I will need one of these keystones for myself if I am to have any success.
textByHash.51392db81ec42dcb8d57766418cdc8a2c78180a7: It is a keystone that keeps the nagua imprisoned in Neypotzli. I'm sure it can't be the only one in there.
textByHash.c43811136aa65745d1fc7d2de24be5d9cd74e90e: So you claim, and yet you don't actually have a choice. If you want my help, you'll find me a keystone.
textByHash.63bd892fe31c33854e318b7f14a79adf32494617: Of course! I assume you've already sorted my payment?
textByHash.8e1114f1a1d8923e0f96ba982dd537c2d396e65f: Ah, truth be told, the money is just a bonus. The chance to be the one to show you fools the truth... That, my friends, is the real prize.
textByHash.19c8e9f900c7794643d1a278aa03c87748aef253: Anyway, best we all get to work. You have a keystone to find.
